error_message:
ERROR MESSAGE:  
Compilation failed with multiple critical errors in function ‘read_slice_info’ and ‘decode_f1ap_setup_response’ in file openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c.  
Specifically:  
- Unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’ at line 386 in function ‘read_slice_info’.  
- Unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’ at line 1115 in function ‘decode_f1ap_setup_response’.  
- Requests for member ‘list’ in something not a structure or union at lines 387, 390, 1117, and 1118.  
These errors caused the build to fail with:  
"gmake[3]: *** [openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/build.make:104: openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/f1

Highest Priority Compiler Ground Truth:
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (unknown_type_name) unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (undeclared_identifier) ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’ undeclared (first use in this function); did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (compiler_error) expected expression before ‘)’ token
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1115 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (unknown_type_name) unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’; did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1116 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (undeclared_identifier) ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’ undeclared (first use in this function); did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1116 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (compiler_error) expected expression before ‘)’ token
(Omitted 2 secondary/cascade compiler cluster(s); fix primary issues first.)

phase3_fixes.error_text:
ERROR MESSAGE:  
Compilation failed with multiple critical errors in function ‘read_slice_info’ and ‘decode_f1ap_setup_response’ in file openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c.  
Specifically:  
- Unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’ at line 386 in function ‘read_slice_info’.  
- Unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’ at line 1115 in function ‘decode_f1ap_setup_response’.  
- Requests for member ‘list’ in something not a structure or union at lines 387, 390, 1117, and 1118.  
These errors caused the build to fail with:  
"gmake[3]: *** [openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/build.make:104: openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/f1

Highest Priority Compiler Ground Truth:
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (unknown_type_name) unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (undeclared_identifier) ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t’ undeclared (first use in this function); did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:386 [read_slice_info] (compiler_error) expected expression before ‘)’ token
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1115 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (unknown_type_name) unknown type name ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’; did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1116 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (undeclared_identifier) ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t’ undeclared (first use in this function); did you mean ‘F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t’?
- /home/tcs/Phani/gNB-CU/openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_interface_management.c:1116 [decode_f1ap_setup_response] (compiler_error) expected expression before ‘)’ token
(Omitted 2 secondary/cascade compiler cluster(s); fix primary issues first.)

fix_suggestion.reason: The root cause of the compilation errors is the use of incorrect ASN.1 generated type names for protocol extension containers in the F1AP interface management code. The compiler errors indicate unknown type names 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t' and 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t', which do not exist in the ASN.1 generated headers. The compiler suggests the correct types are 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t' and 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t' respectively. These type mismatches cause undeclared identifier errors and invalid member accesses. The errors occur in the functions 'read_slice_info' and 'decode_f1ap_setup_response' where these types are used to cast IE extensions and access their lists. Correcting these type names to the suggested ones resolves the compilation errors by matching the actual ASN.1 generated types. No configuration changes are needed as this is purely a code-level type mismatch issue.

code_patches.description: Replaced incorrect type 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t' with correct 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t' as suggested by compiler to fix unknown type and undeclared identifier errors.

Replaced incorrect type 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t' with correct 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t' as suggested by compiler to fix unknown type and undeclared identifier errors.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The compilation errors stem from the use of outdated or incorrect ASN.1 generated type names for protocol extension containers in the F1AP interface management source file. The types 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P34_t' and 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696P228_t' do not exist in the current ASN.1 generated headers. The compiler suggests the correct types are 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t' and 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t', which correspond to the ASN.1 module version or specification release currently used. This mismatch causes undeclared identifier errors and invalid member accesses, leading to build failure. Correcting these type names to the compiler-suggested ones aligns the code with the actual ASN.1 generated types and resolves the errors.
investigation_steps: Examine compiler error messages for unknown type names and undeclared identifiers.
Identify the exact lines and functions where these types are used (read_slice_info and decode_f1ap_setup_response).
Check compiler suggestions for correct type names (F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P34_t and F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016P228_t).
Verify ASN.1 generated headers to confirm the correct type names.
Replace incorrect type names with the correct ones in the source code.
Rebuild the project to confirm that the errors are resolved.
